title: Mission-control write-control design (spec only, no implementation)
description: Gap-plan increment 4 (mission-control-command-center-gap-plan.md). Design (do not implement) how the mission-control TUI's disabled intervention keybindings (approve/reject/nudge/kill/budget-bump/halt-clear/dead-letter-replay) would eventually call sanctioned commands safely: map_task.py approve/reject, dead_letter_queue.py replay, hcom send for nudge, halt_state.py clear, cost-governance for budget. Every control must specify dry-run/preview behavior, required confirmation text, post-action validator re-checks, and rollback/non-rollback expectations. This is explicitly a design artifact per the gap plan's non-goal: do not add write-capable TUI actions before this design is reviewed and approved. Read mission-control-command-center-gap-plan.md, mission-control-tui-spec.md, map-kill-switch-spec.md, and map-validator-halt-state-spec.md before editing.
acceptance_criteria: Spec covers all 7 currently-disabled intervention keys (A/R/K/N/B/O/D) with the sanctioned command each would call.
Every control specifies dry-run/preview text, explicit confirmation requirement, and which validator(s) re-run after the action.
Spec states rollback or non-rollback expectation per control, consistent with CHANGE_CONTROL_SYSTEM.md.
Spec explicitly states this is design-only; no code in scripts/mission_control_tui.py or _mission_control_app.py is changed by this task.
